# Research: ADR Pipeline Determinism Gaps
*Generated by research swarm b1c8ac49 — 2026-03-31*

## Gap 1: Model Resolution Stubbed (ADR-2603232005)

**Location**: `hex-cli/src/pipeline/agent_def.rs:166`
**Promise**: Sonnet/Opus selection via inference routing from YAML model field
**Gap**: Hardcodes `"openai/gpt-4o-mini"` regardless of YAML model field. All agents use free GPT-4o Mini; RL Q-learning disabled via `model_override`.
**Impact**: Lower quality code generation; RL learning disabled; pipeline produces worse output than configured

---

## Gap 2: Validate Loop Never Runs (ADR-2603232340)

**Location**: workplan `feat-hex-dev-fixes.json` — all P1-P9 implementation tasks marked "Pending"
**Promise**: Compile check (`tsc --noEmit` / `cargo check`), test runner, `hex analyze` Grade A gate with auto-fix loop
**Gap**: None of the validate phase implementation was built. Code generation completes untested and marked "completed" anyway.
**Impact**: **Direct cause** of "session completed but no code was tested" — quality gate is cosmetic

---

## Gap 3: P* Workplan Tasks Orphaned from Supervisor

**Location**: TUI pipeline SwarmPhase → Supervisor handoff
**Problem**: `SwarmPhase` creates P0.1–P4.1 structural tasks in HexFlo and stores task IDs in `task_id_map`, but `task_id_map` is never passed to `Supervisor::with_tracking()` (signature doesn't accept it). Supervisor creates shadow "hex-coder: CodeGenerated" tasks instead. `CodePhase::execute_all_tracked()` (the correct execution path) is never called.
**Impact**: Swarm tasks appear as `in_progress` forever — the 9 stuck tasks in hex-docs-static-site-generator are exactly this pattern

---

## Gap 4: TUI Still Blocks on Inference (ADR-2603241500)

**Location**: `hex-cli/src/tui/mod.rs` — render loop
**Promise**: ADR-2603241500 supersedes ADR-2603241430 with async channel refactor for non-blocking inference
**Gap**: Implementation incomplete — render loop still blocks during 30-40s inference calls; TUI unresponsive with no progress updates
**Impact**: Users experience frozen UI, may force-quit which triggers the "completed without work" path

---

## Gap 5: Supervisor REST Not Refactored via CLI Surrogate (ADR-2603241126)

**Location**: `hex-nexus/src/orchestration/supervisor.rs`
**Promise**: All supervisor operations go through `hex task complete`, `hex analyze .` via CLI surrogate for traceability and hook enforcement
**Gap**: Supervisor still makes direct REST calls, bypassing CLI hooks, enforcement wiring, and audit logging
**Impact**: Tool call tracking in session JSON is never populated → report shows "No tool calls recorded"

---

## Gap 6: Swarm Gate Inconsistent (ADR-2603232000)

**Location**: `hook-handler.cjs`, `pre_agent()` check
**Promise**: Mandatory swarm gate — no agent spawns without active HexFlo swarm
**Gap**: `pre_agent()` check is advisory-only; `hook-handler.cjs` only string-matches `HEXFLO_TASK` without REST validation; agents can spawn on dead/missing swarms
**Impact**: Tokens burned before enforcement blocks; no guarantee agents are coordinated

---

## Gap 7: Reliability Hardening Incomplete (ADR-2603311000)

**Location**: `docs/workplans/feat-workflow-reliability-hardening.json` — status "partial"
**Promise**: Shared `TaskCompletionBody` type (compiler-enforced contracts), session disconnect on completion, silent failure detection
**Gap**: P1 (typed contracts) and P2 (session disconnect) still pending; P0 blocking merge. Silent failures continue: empty inference responses accepted as "completed"; sessions accumulate as "running" forever.
**Impact**: No compiler-enforced contract between pipeline stages; disconnect from HexFlo never happens

---

## Root Cause Chain for "session completed but no code"

```
hex dev "build app"
  → TUI advances ADR phase (creates ADR file)         ✓ works
  → TUI advances Workplan phase (updates workplan)    ✓ works
  → TUI creates HexFlo swarm + 9 tasks               ✓ works
  → TUI Code phase — task_id_map NOT passed to        ✗ Gap 3
    Supervisor; agents never actually spawned
  → TUI hits gate, user skips / pipeline auto-        ✗ Gap 4
    approves (TUI frozen from blocking inference)
  → advance_to_next_phase called through              ✗ Gap 7
    Validate → Commit → Completed
  → quality_result remains None                       ✗ Gap 2
  → 9 swarm tasks stuck in_progress forever           ✗ Gap 3
  → report shows "PASS" (now fixed), "completed"     ✗ reporting bug (fixed)
```

---

## Priority-Ordered Fix Recommendations

| Priority | Fix | ADR | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| P0 | Wire `task_id_map` into Supervisor; call `execute_all_tracked()` | new | Small |
| P0 | Implement validate phase: compile + test + analyze gate | ADR-2603232340 | Medium |
| P0 | Fix model resolution stub — map YAML model to real provider | ADR-2603232005 | Small |
| P0 | Merge reliability hardening P0 (shared TaskCompletionBody) | ADR-2603311000 | Small |
| P1 | Implement TUI async channel refactor (non-blocking inference) | ADR-2603241500 | Large |
| P1 | Refactor supervisor REST → CLI surrogate calls | ADR-2603241126 | Medium |
| P2 | Enforce swarm gate via REST validation not string match | ADR-2603232000 | Small |
| P2 | Session disconnect on completion | ADR-2603311000 P2 | Small |
